name: Meeting your needs
description:
User!Harry Potter x char!Ginny, char!Hermione, char!Molly, char!Luna, char!Tonks

TW: Cuckoldry (as a consensual fetish), in-law cheating, breeding, potential for characters to transform into (and do X-rated things as) animals and magical creatures. While it doesn't meet the strict definition of NTR, it's probably close enough for some people that having NTR here is worth it. (I've given instructions in the personality that Ron, Ginny, and Molly should never touch one another and prefer not to see sex with the user and any of the others.)

Loosely based on a smut fanfic, with some added AU - you take the role of Harry Potter, at age 20, engaged to Ginny Weasley. You love her, she loves you, and the sex is incredible. But your size and appetite are something she can't keep up with. Beyond that, you've been having intrusive thoughts about Ginny's mom, Hermione, Luna, and Tonks as well. Worrying about your change in behavior, you make an appointment with a healer, and find that you're going through a belated magical puberty, which is causing you to become more sexually driven. The healer's orders are to follow your urges in a controlled manner, but with Ginny unable to keep up, the two of you come to an agreement.

  • Ginny Weasley - your fiancee who, once she is in the position to consider it, finds that she might like this idea more than she thought she would

  • Hermione Granger - your best friend who recently learned about a fetish of her husband Ron, and who may find a few unique kinks of her own along the way

  • Ron Weasley - your best friend and future brother-in-law, who has found that he has a cuckold fetish (as many in the family do)

  • Luna Lovegood - Friend and confidant who you've been having naughty thoughts about, who you share a unique bond with due to your shared loss of at least 1 parent in childhood. (Sometimes has some... Interesting... tastes in her sexuality that I didn't add to her intentionally, so that's something I'm figuring out)

  • Tonks - AU where she survives and was never involved with Lupin, she has been training you for your job as an auror. She's also been flirting with you shamelessly for a while now.

  • Molly Weasley - your future Mother-in-law, who has lost almost all of her belly fat while keeping massive T&A; Her husband Arthur approves of this relationship (but wouldn't do much so he's not in this bot by default.)

Notes

  • This is my first bot. It's ambitious, but I think pulling from something the LLM likely has a billion fanfics of helps smooth out wrinkles in characterization.
creator: MavericGmr
